title: Polter Finance
relevance_summary: Oracle manipulation followed by flash loan on a newly launched market

prevention.rule: Block any tx that manipulates oracle prices followed by a flash loan in the same tx

summary: Polter Finance lost $8.7 million due to an oracle manipulation attack followed by a flash loan. A flash loan was used to artificially inflate the BOO token price, allowing the attacker to withdraw large amounts of funds. A guard could have blocked such transactions by detecting price manipulation followed by a flash loan in the same transaction.
